reason: ST1 核心动作是引入新依赖；必须遵守 'Verify lock-graph compatibility before declaring a version range' 流程：先 flutter pub deps | grep + pubspec.lock 验证，再 declare 版本范围
research 已确认 extended_image 10.0.1 与现有依赖锁图无冲突；该文件含完整传递性依赖清单（extended_image_library / http_client_helper / crypto / js stub / web）+ 平台支持矩阵 + 维护信号
